name: Trilogy International Partners Inc.
description: Trilogy International Partners Inc. was a wireless telecommunications company that previously provided voice and data communications services in international markets, including New Zealand and Bolivia. Founded by wireless industry pioneers, the company was formerly listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange. Following a plan of arrangement approved by shareholders and the British Columbia Supreme Court, the company was acquired by SG Enterprises. Today, the entity serves primarily as a holding structure for its remaining interests, having transitioned from its active role as an international telecommunications operator.
